title: DLSA Angul Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 45 Para Legal Volunteer Posts
description: District Legal Services Authority Angul (DLSA)Mhas announced the official notification for 2026. To fill up the various vacancies for Para Legal Volunteers Jobs. Those candidates who have qualified in the 10th Pass can grab this chance and apply for the DLSA Angul Recruitment 2026 . Here, we included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, application fee, and how to apply for these posts.
